overall.description: A third-person game scene showing an armored character exploring a dark, foggy forest at night with a torch. The character traverses from a rocky cliff overlook down through a grassy meadow and into a wooded trail as rain begins to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff overlook above foggy valley

events.description: rain begins falling, visible as streaks in the torchlight

agents.ego_description: armored character holding a lit torch, standing on rocky terrain overlooking a foggy valley

entered.detail: jagged rock formation at the edge of a steep drop-off
deep fog-filled valley below the cliff edge
silhouetted trees visible on distant hillsides through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast foggy valley at night. Rain begins to fall as the torch illuminates the immediate rocky ground and the misty darkness below.

events.description: character steps off rocky terrain onto grassy meadow with wildflowers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass and yellow wildflowers, torch lighting the path ahead

entered.detail: tall grass covering the forest floor
clusters of small yellow flowers scattered in the grass
tall coniferous trees surrounding the meadow

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the rocky overlook into a grassy meadow filled with yellow wildflowers. Tall pine trees surround the clearing as rain continues to fall in the torchlight.

events.description: entering denser forest area with large rock formations flanking the path

agents.ego_description: navigating a narrow dirt path winding between large trees and mossy boulders

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulder beside the forest path
narrow winding dirt trail through dense forest

segments.scene_description: The character enters a denser section of forest with a narrow dirt path flanked by large rock formations. The trees close in overhead, blocking most of the sky, while the torch reveals mossy boulders and thick undergrowth in the rainy darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a high, misty overlook into the claustrophobic depths of a rainy forest. It begins on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast, foggy valley at night, where a torch illuminates the immediate ground as rain starts to fall. As the character moves downward, the rocky terrain gives way to a grassy meadow filled with yellow wildflowers and surrounded by tall pine trees. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the clearing and enters a denser section of the forest, following a narrow dirt path. Finally, the environment closes in with overhead branches and large mossy boulders, blocking the sky and trapping the character in the rainy darkness of the thick undergrowth.
